The '''YT-2550''' was a medium [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] from [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation's]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]].

YT-2550s were seen in use by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Like other YT series vessels, they could be easily modified.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The YT-2550 has only been found in one [[West End Games]] sourcebook and its re-issue in a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|second edition]] adventure anthology. It wasn't even identified by name until the later revision. The statistics listed here were derived from a modified YT-2550 and may differ significantly from a baseline example of the class.
